title: A novel single cell method to identify the genetic composition at a single nuclear body.
author: Anchel D Ching RW Cotton R Li R Bazett-Jones DP
content: S-EPMC4937434 PMC4937434 A novel single cell method to identify the genetic composition at a single nuclear body. Gene loci make specific associations with compartments of the nucleus (e.g. the nuclear envelope, nucleolus, and transcription factories) and this association may determine or reflect
